nasb.text: For it is written, “As I live, says the Lord, every knee shall bow to Me, And every tongue shall give praise to God.”

esv.text: for it is written, “As I live, says the Lord, every knee shall bow to me, and every tongue shall confess to God.”

cnv.text: 因為經上記著： “主說，我指著我的永生起誓： 萬膝必向我跪拜， 萬口必稱頌　神。”

ccb.text: 圣经上说：“主说，‘我凭我的永恒起誓，万膝必向我跪拜，万口必称颂上帝。’”

csbs.text: 因为经上记着： “主说：我指着我的永生起誓， 万膝将向我跪下， 万口将承认神。”
